name: WEST PEST
subtitle: West Coast Semi-Modular Synthesizer
summary: A fully analog west coast-style semi-modular synthesizer designed in partnership with Pittsburgh Modular. Built around a Pittsburgh-designed oscillator and wavefolder, a Buchla-inspired Dynamics Controller (combined filter/VCA/EG), an LFO, a multi-mod tool, MIDI-to-CV, a step sequencer, and a button keyboard — all with 18 Eurorack-compatible patch points.
